id.description: Optional identifier for the line item. This is saved by Anrok and returned in the response, but not used for anything by Anrok.

productExternalId.description: A product ID that has already been defined in the Anrok UI (under "Product IDs"). This is used to determine whether the line item is taxable.

amount.description: The sale price in the smallest denomination of the currency (e.g. cents or pennies).

isTaxIncludedInAmount.description: Whether the line item already includes tax in the amount.

quantity.description: The quantity of the line item, as a string (e.g. `3` or `0.5`).
